summary: Completed testing of Cart Edit Feature for Printout e-commerce app. All 10 backend API tests passed (PATCH endpoint, cart item updates, error handling). Frontend tests verified: Edit button (pencil icon) appears on cart items with customization, clicking edit navigates to editor with ?edit={cartItemId} param, editor pre-fills all saved data (name, font, color, motif, background), button shows 'Spara ändringar' in edit mode, saving updates existing item without creating duplicates.
critical_code_review_comments: cart.py: PATCH endpoint correctly preserves cart_item_id while updating all item data
CartContext.js: updateCartItem method properly calls PATCH endpoint
CartItemCard.js: isEditable() correctly checks for customization data, getEditorUrl() generates correct URLs with edit param
NameTagEditor.js: Properly hydrates state from cart item when editCartItemId is present, button text changes to 'Spara ändringar'
CalendarEditor.js: Edit mode support implemented with hydration from cart item
PhotoAlbumEditor.js: Edit mode support implemented with hydration from cart item, AlbumSidebar receives editMode prop
context_for_next_testing_agent: Cart Edit Feature fully tested. PATCH /api/cart/{session_id}/items/{cart_item_id} endpoint updates cart items while preserving cart_item_id. Frontend edit flow: Cart page shows pencil icon on items with customization, clicking navigates to editor with ?edit={cartItemId}, editor pre-fills saved data, button shows 'Spara ändringar', saving updates existing item. Tested with nametag product (4e5641a2-80de-4f1c-bae7-eba700925192). Calendar and PhotoAlbum editors also support edit mode via ?edit= query param.

Backend PATCH Endpoint.PATCH /api/cart/{session_id}/items/{cart: ✓ Updates cart item data while preserving cart_item_id
Backend PATCH Endpoint.Error handling - non-existent item: ✓ Returns 404 with 'Artikel hittades inte i varukorgen'
Backend PATCH Endpoint.No duplicate creation: ✓ PATCH updates existing item, doesn't create new one

Frontend Cart Page.Edit button visibility: ✓ Pencil icon appears on items with customization data

Frontend NameTag Editor Edit Mode.Data hydration: ✓ Pre-fills child_name, last_name, phone_number, font, font_color, motif, background
Frontend NameTag Editor Edit Mode.Button text change: ✓ Shows 'Spara ändringar' instead of 'Lägg i kundvagn'

Frontend Calendar Editor Edit Mode.Edit mode support: ✓ Reads ?edit= param, hydrates year, size, month images

Frontend PhotoAlbum Editor Edit Mode.Edit mode support: ✓ Reads ?edit= param, hydrates pages, cover, size, material
Frontend PhotoAlbum Editor Edit Mode.Button text change: ✓ Shows 'Spara ändringar' in edit mode via editMode prop

backend_api_tests.test_nametag_product_exists: ✓ PASSED - Product exists with model_type nametag
backend_api_tests.test_patch_cart_item_updates_data: ✓ PASSED - All customization fields updated, cart_item_id preserved
backend_api_tests.test_patch_does_not_create_duplicate: ✓ PASSED - Item count unchanged after PATCH
backend_api_tests.test_get_cart_returns_editable_items: ✓ PASSED - Customization data returned for editing

frontend_ui_tests.Cart shows edit button: ✓ Pencil icon visible on cart item
frontend_ui_tests.Editor pre-fills data: ✓ Name, last name, font, color all pre-filled
frontend_ui_tests.Button shows 'Spara ändringar': ✓ Correct Swedish text in edit mode
frontend_ui_tests.Save updates item: ✓ Updated name visible in cart, no duplicate
frontend_ui_tests.Calendar editor loads: ✓ Page loads with 'Lägg i varukorg' button
frontend_ui_tests.PhotoAlbum editor loads: ✓ Page loads with 'Lägg i kundvagn' button
